nasb.text: “But if he is poor and his means are insufficient, then he is to take one male lamb for a guilt offering as a wave offering to make atonement for him, and one-tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, and a log of oil,

esv.text: “But if he is poor and cannot afford so much, then he shall take one male lamb for a guilt offering to be waved, to make atonement for him, and a tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, and a log of oil;

cnv.text: “但如果他貧窮，經濟能力不足，他只要拿一隻公綿羊羔作贖愆祭，搖一搖為他贖罪；要把調油的細麵一公斤作素祭，和三分之一公升的油一同拿來；

ccb.text: “他如果贫穷，献不起那么多祭物，可以献一只公羊羔作赎过祭，用摇祭的方式赎罪；也要献一公斤作素祭的调油的细面粉和一杯油；
